name: send_conversation_message
description: Send a message within an existing conversation. The message is delivered through the conversation's active channel (SMS, WhatsApp, etc.). Supports text, images, video, audio, files, locations, and template messages. Use this to reply to customers or send follow-up messages in an ongoing conversation thread.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique conversation ID. This is a path parameter in the URL.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: The message content. For 'text': {'text': '...'}. For 'image': {'image': {'url': '...'}}. For 'location': {'location': {'latitude': 52.37, 'longitude': 4.90}}.

parameters.name: channelId
parameters.description: Override the channel to use for this message. If omitted, uses the conversation's last active channel.

content.text: Your support ticket #4521 has been resolved. Please let us know if you need anything else!
Your support ticket #4521 has been resolved. Please let us know if you need anything else!
